title: High-throughput platform for discovery of elicitors of silent bacterial gene clusters
research_problem: Silent or cryptic gene clusters remain inactive under laboratory conditions
No known signals activate specific silent clusters
Need systematic approach to identify elicitors
Three variables in activation: unknown signal, uncharacterized cluster, novel metabolite

innovation.approach: Platform enabling small molecule activator discovery
innovation.advantage: Identifies elicitors without a priori knowledge of activation mechanisms
innovation.application: Systematic activation of cryptic clusters for drug discovery

silent_cluster_context.scope: ~10% of bacterial biosynthetic potential currently accessible
silent_cluster_context.reservoir: Silent clusters harbor extensive supply of potential drug candidates
silent_cluster_context.challenge: No efficient method to identify activation signals

methodology_advantages: Doesn't require knowing regulatory pathways beforehand
Can identify novel chemical classes of activators
Platform applicable to any silent cluster
